help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the rule set under the profile which is unique globally.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="rules" identifiers="ruleName">
<prop type="array" name="actions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_read>" name="parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array" name="conditions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">

<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the rule set under the profile which is unique globally.

command.name: create

help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the rule set under the profile which is unique globally

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules" options="rules" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].actions" options="actions">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].AfdUrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" options="parameter-name-override">
<help short="The set of query strings to be placed in the redirect URL. Setting this value would replace any existing query string; leave empty to preserve the incoming query string. Query string must be in = format. ? and & will be added automatically so do not include them."/>
<arg type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_create>" var="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].UrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" options="parameter-name-override">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions" options="conditions">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$resource.properties.rules" identifiers="ruleName">
<prop type="array" name="actions" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].actions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameterNameOverride" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].AfdUrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_create>" name="parameterNameOverride" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].UrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array" name="conditions" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.transforms">

<prop type="array" name="rules" identifiers="ruleName">
<prop type="array" name="actions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_read>" name="parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array" name="conditions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">

command.name: update

help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium or CDN profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the rule set under the profile which is unique globally.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules" options="rules" group="Properties">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].actions" options="actions">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].AfdUrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" options="parameter-name-override">
<help short="The set of query strings to be placed in the redirect URL. Setting this value would replace any existing query string; leave empty to preserve the incoming query string. Query string must be in = format. ? and & will be added automatically so do not include them."/>
<arg nullable="True" type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_update>" var="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].UrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" options="parameter-name-override">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions" options="conditions">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.matchValues" options="match-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.transforms" options="transforms">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="rules" identifiers="ruleName">
<prop type="array" name="actions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_read>" name="parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array" name="conditions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">

<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$resource.properties.rules" identifiers="ruleName">
<prop type="array" name="actions" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].actions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameterNameOverride" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].AfdUrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array<@UrlSigningParamIdentifier_update>" name="parameterNameOverride" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].actions[].UrlSigning.parameters.parameterNameOverride" identifiers="paramName">
<prop type="array" name="conditions" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ClientPort.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].Cookies.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HostName.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].HttpVersion.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].IsDevice.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].PostArgs.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].QueryString.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RemoteAddress.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestBody.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestHeader.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestMethod.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestScheme.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].RequestUri.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].ServerPort.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SocketAddr.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].SslProtocol.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileExtension.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlFileName.parameters.transforms">
<prop type="array" name="matchValues" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.matchValues">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$resource.properties.rules[].conditions[].UrlPath.parameters.transforms">
